caption: The video features Dave Vellante, Co-Founder & Co-CEO of SiliconANGLE Media, Inc., speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. He is dressed formally in a suit and tie, wearing glasses and a microphone, indicating that he is likely conducting an interview or delivering a presentation. The setting appears to be a professional environment, possibly a conference room or studio, with a blurred background that includes a door and some windows. The video is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text on the screen. The content seems to focus on technology and business discussions related to MongoDB's offerings and industry insights.
